message:
chore(deps): Update dependencies and improve tool runner stability

Routine dependency updates with minor improvements to process supervision
and tool execution reliability.

- Update workspace dependencies in Cargo.lock
- Bump pt-common and pt-core crate versions
- Refine tool_runner.rs command execution
- Improve app_supervision.rs process monitoring

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
